maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit. Closed monthly issue #74 as completed on 2026-06-25.
notes: 2026-06-26 run (13:27 UTC): Tasks 5+4. Created 2 PRs: (1) refactor dedup constants/lerp/JsonOptions, (2) CI build workflow. Issues #65,#78,#79,#82 still have patches only in issue bodies - consider creating real PRs next run. CI workflow PR supersedes issue #77 patch.
